title: ctenitis nitida
intro: Ctenitis nitida, also known as the glossy tree fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the rhizome, which contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. These compounds have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Traditionally, the rhizome is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it may also be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules.
